## 2024-05-24 - Icon-Only Button Accessibility in Markdown
**Learning:** Icon-only buttons embedded inside dynamic HTML content (like markdown renderers parsing code blocks) often miss accessibility attributes because they aren't standard React components.
**Action:** Always ensure that strings containing interactive elements generated by string replacement (e.g., in `parseMarkdown`) include `aria-label` for screen readers and `aria-hidden="true"` on their decorative icons.
